docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $72.00 SERVED NOV-08-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. DAVID MCDONALD PLAINTIFF ANNETTE ELIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA STRONG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-221) RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIAS, ANNETTE DBA RC ELIAS TRAVEL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, MARIA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,007.00 FILED BY ELIAS, ANNETTE DBA RC ELIAS TRAVEL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY ELIAS, ANNETTE DBA RC ELIAS TRAVEL SERVICE STRONG, MARIA
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STRONG, MARIA AS TO PLAINTIFF ELIAS, ANNETTE DBA RC ELIAS TRAVEL SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELIAS, ANNETTE DBA RC ELIAS TRAVEL SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRONG, MARIA $2,007.00 PRINCIPAL, $122.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,129.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPOROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $500.00 O THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING: MARCH 15, 2017. UNTIL JUNE 15, 2018, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT:$ 627.00.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
